category_sources: source_facts.description says full-stack quantum processing toolkit; official GitHub repository and project paper describe staq as a full-stack quantum processing toolkit.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is staq; official GitHub repository is softwareQinc/staq and uses the name staq.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface; project paper references the official GitHub wiki page for the staq tool suite.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set, so repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list identify staq as a quantum processing toolkit with QASM and compiler-related command-line tools.
